hooks.command: Set-Location 'D:\Nitin\Claude Projects'; $ghExe = 'D:\winget install --id GitHub.cli\gh.exe'; git add -A; $status = git status --porcelain; if ($status) { $msg = "Auto-commit: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"; git commit -m $msg; git push origin HEAD 2>&1 } else { Write-Host 'Nothing to commit' }
